app.name: E-Reconcile MN
app.description: Organization-scoped reconciliation workspace for finance teams.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Use your organization account to continue.

register.title: Create first organization
register.subtitle: This one-time setup creates the first Admin membership.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Request a reset link for an active account.

messages.noActiveMembership: No active organization membership was found for this account.
messages.resetLinkSent: If an active account exists, a password reset link will be sent.
messages.firstOrganizationComplete: First organization setup is already complete. Ask an Admin to create your membership.
messages.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.importTransactionsDescription: CSV/XLSX import will attach to this organization context in Phase 2.
dashboard.reviewReconciliationDescription: Manual matching and approval routes will use the same server-side session guard.
dashboard.manageAccessDescription: Fixed Admin, Finance Manager, Accountant, Auditor, and Viewer roles are seeded per tenant.

descriptions.admin: Full tenant administration and financial workflow access.
descriptions.financeManager: Reviews, approves, reports, and manages reconciliation work.
descriptions.accountant: Imports transactions, reviews records, and prepares reconciliations.
descriptions.auditor: Reviews transactions, reports, and audit history without editing financial data.
descriptions.viewer: Read-only access to approved finance workspace views.

system.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
system.screenNotImplemented: This screen is not yet implemented

403.title: Access Denied
403.description: You don't have permission to view this page. Contact your administrator to request access.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. We're working to fix it. Please try again in a moment.

maintenance.title: Scheduled Maintenance
maintenance.description: E-Reconcile MN is undergoing scheduled maintenance. We'll be back online shortly.

offline.title: No Internet Connection
offline.description: Check your internet connection and try again. Your data is safe.
